mapper.insert: INSERT INTO table_message (table_id, macro_id, content, is_read) VALUES (#{tableId}, #{macroId}, #{content}, FALSE)
mapper.select: SELECT id, table_id, macro_id, content, is_read, created_at FROM table_message WHERE is_read = FALSE ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, table_id, macro_id, content, is_read, created_at FROM table_message WHERE table_id = #{tableId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE table_message SET is_read = TRUE WHERE is_read = FALSE
